section.heading: Authorization of appropriations

content.p: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out the purposes of this subchapter such sums as may be necessary.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 94–469, title IV, § 412, as added Pub. L. 102–550, title X, § 1021(a), Oct. 28, 1992, 106 Stat. 3923.)
